What We Offer

Tailored care for every dog

Dog Walking

Daily structured walks that keep your dog healthy, stimulated, and socialised. Solo and small group walks available.

  • 30 & 60-minute options
  • Real-time photo updates
  • Solo or small group walks

Dog Sitting

Home-from-home boarding and in-home sitting services so your dog feels safe and loved while you're away.

  • Overnight & day sitting
  • Home boarding available
  • Daily updates & photos
  • Feeding to your schedule
  • Emergency vet cover

Why Choose Us

Where dogs are
treated like family

At Posh Paws Studio, we believe every dog deserves the very best. Our fully trained and insured team brings passion, expertise, and genuine love to every session — whether that's an adventure-filled walk or a cosy overnight stay.

We take time to understand your dog's individual personality, preferences, and needs. No two dogs are the same, and neither is our care.

Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

What areas do you cover?

▼
Aylesbury, Tring, Berkhamstead, Hemel Hempstead, Leighton Buzzard & Milton Keynes. Our service coverage is expanding regularly. Please contact us with your postcode and we'll confirm if we can serve your location.

How do I book a service?

▼
Give us a call or text on 07428476346 or drop us an email at hello@poshpawsstudio.co.uk. Our team will respond within 4 hours to confirm your booking and discuss any specific requirements for your dog.

Are you insured and DBS checked?

▼
Yes! Our entire team is fully insured and DBS checked. We take the safety and well-being of your dog extremely seriously. All necessary credentials are verified and up to date.

What happens if my dog has special needs?

▼
Every dog is unique! We're experienced with anxious dogs, senior dogs, puppies, and dogs with specific health requirements. Please share any dietary needs, medical conditions, or behavioural considerations when you book, and we'll tailor our care accordingly.

Do you offer photo updates?

▼
Absolutely! We provide regular photo and video updates for all services. For sitting and boarding, you'll get daily updates so you can see your pup is having a great time.

What's your cancellation policy?

▼
We require at least 24 hours notice for cancellations or rescheduling. Please contact us as soon as possible if your plans change so we can accommodate your needs.
